name: polymath-connector-monitoring
description: Observability umbrella connector: Grafana dashboard snapshots + Honeycomb trace investigation + Elasticsearch log search. Read-only investigative skills + bounded-scan discipline.

grafanaUrl.title: Grafana base URL
grafanaUrl.description: Full URL to the Grafana instance (e.g. https://grafana.example.com). Leave blank if Grafana is not used.

grafanaApiKey.title: Grafana service account token
grafanaApiKey.description: Service account token with Viewer (or Editor for snapshots) role on the relevant org.

honeycombApiKey.title: Honeycomb API key
honeycombApiKey.description: Environment-scoped API key. Leave blank if Honeycomb is not used.

elasticEndpoint.title: Elastic endpoint
elasticEndpoint.description: Full URL to the Elasticsearch endpoint or Elastic Cloud cloud_id. Leave blank if Elastic is not used.

elasticApiKey.title: Elastic API key
elasticApiKey.description: API key with read access on the indices used for triage. Avoid superuser keys.
